title: November 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 25''' is the 329th (in leap years the 330th) day of the year. There are 36 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1920|1920]] – [[Shelagh Fraser]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 44|''Star Wars'' (1977) 44]] published.
*[[1984]] – ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' debuts on ABC. For its TV broadcast, however, it is given the name ''The Ewok Adventure''.
*[[1998]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 5]] published.
*1998 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: Legacy Volume 7: Storms]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Legacy (2006) 42|''Legacy'' (2006) 42]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Kidnapped]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – "[[Stealth Strike]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*2015 – [[Chewbacca (2015) 4|''Chewbacca'' (2015) 4]] published.
*[[2018]] – "[[The Platform Classic]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 6|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 6]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 2|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader Modern Era Epic Collection: Vader Down]]'' published.
<noinclude>
